ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical signal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical signal */,
  "chemical_structure" TEXT /* Chemical structure of the signal */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the signal */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the signal */,
  "solubility" REAL /* Solubility of the signal */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin of the signal */,
  "possible_function_female_id" INTEGER /* ID of the possible function of the signal in female mice */,
  "possible_function_male_id" INTEGER /* ID of the possible function of the signal in male mice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical signal the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., molecular weight, boiling point) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property (e.g., g/mol, °C) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_properties_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES chemical_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., female urine, male bladder urine) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function (e.g., estrus synchrony, puberty acceleration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_signals" (
  "study_signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-signal pair */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the signal was used in */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical signal used in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_signals_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES chemical_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_signals_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the result belongs to */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_commenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("commenter_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_rater_id FOREIGN KEY ("rater_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_teams" (
  "study_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-team pair */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the researcher is involved in */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved in the study */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the study (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_teams_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_teams_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_origin_relationships" (
  "signal_origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal-origin pair */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical signal */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_origin_relationships_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_origin_relationships_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES chemical_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_function_relationships" (
  "signal_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal-function pair */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical signal */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the possible function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_function_relationships_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES chemical_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_function_relationships_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)
